title: Exquisite Indulgent Canadian Cheese Spring Rolls
description: A rich and creamy Canadian dish featuring cheese, coconut cream, and fresh herbs wrapped in rice paper sheets, perfect for a special occasion or indulgent snack. This gluten-free friendly recipe is sure to delight.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded mozzarella and cheddar cheese and mix well.
Add the chopped parsley, dill, salt, pepper, and garlic powder to the cheese mixture and stir until combined.
Lay a rice paper sheet flat on a clean surface and brush the edges with olive oil.
Place about 1 tablespoon of the cheese mixture in the center of the rice paper sheet.
Brush the edges of the rice paper sheet with a little water, then fold the bottom half up over the filling, fold in the sides, and roll up the sheet to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining rice paper sheets and cheese mixture.
Heat about 1-2 inches of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until it reaches 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Carefully place a few of the spring rolls in the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the spring rolls from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the spring rolls hot with a side of coconut cream for dipping.
